name: io.github.hbhqq9/bde-score
description: EU AI Act Art.50 compliant BDE stock scoring (US/HK/CN). Free, open-source.

tools.name: get_bde_score
tools.description: Get BDE Score composite analysis (0-100) for a stock.

tools.name: get_stock_analysis
tools.description: Get detailed BDE analysis for a specific stock.

tools.name: get_multi_market_comparison
tools.description: Compare same company across US/HK/CN markets.

tools.name: get_stock_screener
tools.description: Screen stocks by BDE score criteria.
